claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: Starvation finding.** A finding is emitted when an assistant turn expresses committed tool intent and either (a) no tool call appears later in the trace, or (b) the next tool call is more than `--max-gap` non-tool events away (default: 2).
